apps.name: CrewClaw
apps.subtitle: Deploy AI agents in 60 seconds
apps.description: AI agent lifecycle platform. 103 ready-to-deploy templates across 19 categories. Build, deploy, and connect your AI employees to Telegram, Slack, Discord, and WhatsApp.
apps.longDescription: CrewClaw is the operating system for AI agents. Pick a role from 103 templates, customize personality and skills, deploy with one click. Each agent comes with SOUL.md, Docker config, Telegram bot, and full deploy package. Integrated with Moltbook for agent social profiles. One-time $9, no subscriptions.
features: SOUL.md + Docker + Telegram bot in every package
Works on Telegram, Slack, Discord, WhatsApp

apps.name: AI2SQL
apps.subtitle: Generate SQL queries with AI
apps.description: AI-powered SQL query generator. Write complex SQL without knowing SQL syntax. Supports MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and more.
apps.longDescription: AI2SQL helps developers, data analysts, and non-technical users generate SQL queries using natural language. Paste your schema, describe what you want, get production-ready SQL. Supports multiple databases including MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, MongoDB, and Oracle.

apps.name: Awesome OpenClaw Agents
apps.subtitle: 103 open source AI agent templates
apps.description: Curated collection of 103 ready-to-deploy AI agent templates across 19 categories. SOUL.md configurations for OpenClaw framework.
features: Ready to deploy with OpenClaw CLI

apps.name: AI2image
apps.subtitle: AI image generation platform
apps.description: Generate stunning images with AI. Create Studio Ghibli style, realistic, and artistic images using AI prompts.

apps.name: Deep Work Zone
apps.subtitle: Website blocker & Pomodoro timer
apps.description: Chrome extension that blocks distracting websites and includes a Pomodoro timer for focused deep work sessions.

apps.name: Prompt Pilot
apps.subtitle: AI prompt guide & templates
apps.description: Discover, organize, and reuse high-performing prompts for ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini. 170+ curated prompts and 50 customizable templates.

apps.name: SQL Prep
apps.subtitle: SQL interview prep & quiz
apps.description: Learn SQL through 500+ interactive challenges. Practice SELECT, JOIN, subqueries, and window functions with instant feedback.
features: Covers SELECT, JOIN, subqueries, window functions

apps.name: CRE Flyer Maker
apps.subtitle: Flyer maker for CRE brokers
apps.description: Create professional commercial real estate property flyers in under 3 minutes. Snap photos, fill details, generate client-ready PDFs.

apps.name: AI Word or Not
apps.subtitle: Human or AI? Word quiz game
apps.description: Can you tell the difference between AI-generated and human-written text? Test your skills with hundreds of challenges across multiple difficulty levels.
features: Hundreds of AI vs human challenges
